creator: driesm@freebsd.org
text: Well, my 2 cents, I think that we should not even provide a web server options. Because it is as easy as "pkg install 'web server I want'". This way, all the flexibility is at the users hand. You are right that this will break POLA for the people using LibreNMS with Apache. And I also have no clear path forward. At least it will require an UPDATING entry. Maybe get some buy-in from portmgr and see what they think about this?
